title: AI trading apps
author: mcavoy33
selftext:
I'm looking for something to diversify my portfolio. I have the majority of my money with Raymond James. I also have my own self directed investments. However, I still need more opportunities so I'm looking into AI apps. The first two I looked at Trade Ideas & Trend Spider costs $80+ / month. But I'm also interested in Tickeron, Signal Stack & BlackBoxStocks.

Does anyone have experience with these?

comments.author: JomaFinance
comments.body:
Yes, I have been using it for several months.

I have the subscription for AI Robots and followed FA-oriented ones because I am not an intraday fellow. Can tell it's quite solid.

Also, they have another features like signal for tickers etc if that's what u asked for.

replies.author: mcavoy33
replies.body: Which one have you been using? I ended up signing up for TrendSpider but I don't know how to use it properly yet.

replies.author: JomaFinance
replies.body:
I followed several. My main is Trend Trader: Profitability Model for Mid-Cap Stocks and Long Only (FA). It turned out to be quite profitable for me.

Now I kinda look for Stock Picker: Hidden Titans for MicroCap (FA) but for just 5-10% of capital. It more risky but juicy.

P.S. decided not to provide link cause the mods just delete the reply. Look at AI Robot section and choose only FA flag

replies.author: tickeron_community
replies.body: We really appreciate your interest in our products. We have a huge line of AI robots with unique strategies. If you have any difficulties, we are to help you.

replies.author: mcavoy33
replies.body: Do you have a twitter account I can follow?
